name: @metorial/gitea
description: Manage Git repositories, branches, tags, and commit history on a self-hosted Gitea instance. Create, review, and merge pull requests with code reviews. Track issues with labels, milestones, assignees, time tracking, and dependencies. Manage organizations, teams, and user permissions. Publish and download packages across 20+ package registries (NPM, PyPI, Maven, Docker, etc.). Configure and monitor CI/CD workflows via Gitea Actions. Manage repository wikis, releases, deploy keys, and collaborators. Receive webhook notifications for push, issue, pull request, release, wiki, and package events.
